title: Operates Undercover
summary: Under the guise of someone else, you seek to find answers the powerful do not want divulged.
tiers: Tier 3: Agent Provocateur or Run and Fight
Tier 6: Trust to Luck or Deadly Strike
gm_intrusions: Bad luck can ruin the best plans. Disguises fail. Allies are revealed to be agents, too.
text: Under the guise of someone else, you seek to find answers the powerful do not want divulged. (Someone who Operates Undercover might have additional equipment that includes a disguise kit.)
details: Under the guise of someone else, you seek to find answers the powerful do not want divulged.
(Someone who Operates Undercover might have additional equipment that includes a disguise kit.)
